text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring of El Condor Pasa's classic year has
ended, and summer camp season is here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing she can't just stay depressed, she
decides that if she has to be worried, it's better to
worry cheerfully.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A bright and exciting summer begins with Mambo
close behind!
